name: Chocolate Coconut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in the recipe.
2. In a large bowl, combine the heavy cream, eggs, fruit juice concentrate, honey, cocoa powder, and salt.
3. Add the coconut flakes, vital gluten (if using), wheat flakes, whole wheat flour, and yeast to the bowl with the wet ingredients.
4. Mix until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped nuts.
6. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake for the time specified in the recipe or until golden brown and cooked through, turning off the heat 5 minutes before the end of the second kneading cycle.
